## Summary

What this changes and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run lint` clean
- [ ] `bun run typecheck` clean
- [ ] `bun test` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for any behaviour change
- [ ] `README.md` updated if the public API changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `[Unreleased]`

## Notes for reviewer

Anything non-obvious about the implementation, alternatives you ruled out,
or follow-ups you're deferring.
